title: Keys Of The Dungeon
description: Keys re-texture, For Dungeons and Taverns.
body:
![or](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22dceb99259dde60b9cbfbfec762de479344111f.png)

This resource pack was made for [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) Datapack made by [NovaWostra](https://modrinth.com/user/NovaWostra)

Changes made in this resource pack:
- Folded chart
- Chart
- Boss sealing Key
- Cave Chamber Key
- Citadel Boss Key
- Citadel Key
- Creeper Key
- Donjon Key
- End Castle Key
- End Ship Key
- Hamlet Key
- Monument Boss Key
- Monument Key
- Nether Key
- Nether Port Key
- Ominous Sealing Key
- Ominous Shrine Key
- Ominous Toxic Key
- Outstation Key
- Sealing Key
- Shrine Key
- Toxic Boss Key
- Toxic Key

Join The [Discord server](https://discord.gg/gFKwwf4rMg) for more updates.

Consider Donating it would help me a lot :D
And also support [Nova](https://www.patreon.com/u43741667) :D

**NOTE: You may NOT Reupload this pack anywhere.**

---
